body:
Opus review of 5652b87.

REAL IMPLEMENTATION: resolver_meta.go (98 lines). Personas: persona.NewPersonaLoader(r.WorkingDir) called directly in resolver — bypasses StateProvider (architecturally cleaner, but introduces a 3rd divergent pattern vs Snapshot (resolver_node) and direct-domain (resolver_agent)). Coordinators: via StateProvider.GetCoordinatorsGraphQL which reads workers.LandCoordinators registry.

NEW UNRESOLVED PREFIX: Persona ID is "persona-" + p.Name. node(id: "persona-xyz") still returns nil because resolver_node.go Node dispatch only handles node- and proj-. This is now the 2nd unresolved prefix after bead- from Stage 2.3. Add to refactor bead.

STATEPROVIDER DIVERGENCE: Stage 2 now has 3 patterns:
1. Projects/Beads → Snapshot types
2. Workers/Sessions/Exec → direct *ddxgraphql.Type
3. Personas → bypass StateProvider entirely
Refactor bead must pick one and normalize.

ACCEPTANCE GAP: same as 2.6 — no TestGraphQLPersonas or TestGraphQLCoordinator* resolver-level tests. Part of the systematic drift.

VERDICT: ACCEPT with test backfill follow-up. Do not reopen.
summary: ACCEPT with test gap: personas via direct persona.PersonaLoader (bypasses StateProvider entirely, a 3rd divergent pattern); coordinators via StateProvider.GetCoordinatorsGraphQL; zero resolver tests per same acceptance drift as 2.6.
